mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( PAY_NO, ITEM_NO, ORDER_ID, PAYMENT_KEY, TOTAL_AMOUNT, METHOD, RECEIPT_URL, APPROVED_AT, PAY_STATUS, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{itemNo}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, #{totalAmount}, #{method}, #{receiptUrl}, #{approvedAt}, 'Y', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT P.PAY_NO as payNo, P.ITEM_NO as itemNo, P.ORDER_ID as orderId, P.TOTAL_AMOUNT as totalAmount, P.METHOD as method, P.RECEIPT_URL as receiptUrl, P.APPROVED_AT as approvedAt, P.PAY_STATUS as payStatus, I.ITEM_TITLE as orderName FROM PAYMENT P JOIN ITEM I ON (P.ITEM_NO = I.ITEM_NO) WHERE P.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND P.PAY_STATUS = 'Y'
